generated_exposure.exposure_text: Just saw a local news report about how expanded domestic security powers helped prevent a major terror plot last month. The authorities said they needed these tools to stay ahead of evolving threats. As someone who values safety, I think it's important we give our security agencies the tools they need to keep us all safe. #NationalSecurity #PublicSafety
